caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT ALL" is speaking into a professional microphone. He is in a room filled with framed photographs on the wall behind him and a white male mannequin wearing a white garment to his right. To the far right, clothing racks are visible. In the lower corners of the scene, there are logos; one on the left is a circular black emblem containing the word "ROOTS", and one on the right consists of stylized red text that reads "ROOTS REALLY HOT". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, gesturing slightly with his right hand and moving his mouth as he speaks, while the background and equipment remain static.
